title: Retail Admin (Exec/Supervisor)
description:
Job Title

Hybrid Retail & Admin (Executive / Supervisor)
(2 positions available)

Job Summary

We are an established apparel company looking for a Hybrid Retail & Admin Executive and Supervisor to support our showroom operations, customer experience, and daily administrative and operational tasks.

This is a hands-on role suited for individuals with retail and/or administrative experience who enjoy variety, staying organised, and working in a small, fast-moving team. The role is primarily operations and showroom support–focused, with occasional walk-in sales and customer interaction.

The Supervisor role carries additional responsibility in overseeing daily operations and working closely with management to develop and improve SOPs and systems.

Work Location

  • 9 Tagore Lane

Salary & Benefits

  • Executive: $2,400 – $2,600 per month (before CPF)

  • Supervisor: $2,800 – $3,500 per month (before CPF)

  • Yearly performance bonus

  • Employee benefits provided (annual leave, insurance, etc.)

Key Responsibilities

Showroom & Retail Operations

  • Support daily showroom operations and ensure a positive customer experience

  • Assist with opening and closing procedures of the showroom

  • Support walk-in sales, customer enquiries (online & offline), and basic upselling

  • Prepare, tidy, and reset the showroom before and after livestreams, campaigns, or activations

  • Steam, organise, and manage samples for display and fittings

  • Execute visual merchandising according to guidelines (racks, displays, samples)

Inventory & Operations Support

  • Handle stock inbounding, outbounding, restocking, and basic stock checks

  • Maintain showroom and back-of-house organisation

  • Support operational workflows to ensure smooth daily execution

Administrative Support

  • Assist with general admin and operational tasks as required

  • Support coordination between retail, warehouse, and internal teams

Additional Responsibilities (Supervisor Role)

  • Oversee daily showroom operations and ensure standards are met

  • Guide and support Executive-level staff in daily tasks

  • Ensure visual merchandising, showroom readiness, and customer experience consistency

  • Work directly with management to develop, refine, and implement SOPs and operational systems

  • Identify operational gaps and propose process improvements

  • Prior supervisory or operational experience is required for this role

Requirements – Executive

  • Prior experience in retail and/or administrative roles

  • Organised, responsible, and detail-oriented

  • Comfortable interacting with customers in a showroom environment

  • Willing to be hands-on with both front-facing and backend tasks

  • Able to work independently and as part of a small team

Requirements – Supervisor

  • Prior experience in retail, showroom, or operations supervision

  • Strong organisational and coordination skills

  • Proven experience in developing or improving SOPs and operational systems

  • Comfortable leading by example in a hands-on environment

Working Hours

  • Monday – Friday: 9:00am – 6:00pm

  • Saturday: 10:30am – 2:30pm

  • 5.5-day work week

Why Join Us

  • Be part of a growing apparel company with a hands-on, collaborative culture

  • Direct exposure to management and decision-making

  • Opportunity to shape showroom operations and internal systems

  • Stable, long-term role with performance-based rewards

How to Apply

Interested candidates, please WhatsApp Felix at 9780 9447 with your resume.
Shortlisted candidates will be contacted for an interview.
